name: Air SE Battery Cassette
summary: Discover the Air SE Battery Cassette, the perfect complement to the Arizer Air SE Vaporiser.
description: Discover the Air SE Battery Cassette, the perfect complement to the Arizer Air SE Vaporiser. This innovative and sturdy cassette securely stores 1-2 batteries, guaranteeing a smooth and productive vaping experience. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
